name: hackathon-260404-shenzhen
description: 边缘 AI 智能餐饮交互系统 × 电子纸同步方案 - Hackathon 2026 深圳

scripts.install:all: npm run install:epaper && npm run install:kitchen-tablet
scripts.install:epaper: cd epaper-sync/edge-server/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start:kitchen-tablet:prod: cd foodshop/kitchen-tablet && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:foodshop-backend" "npm run start:kitchen-tablet" "npm run start:epaper-backend" "npm run start:epaper-frontend"
